heading: Severity Levels
body:
Every alert has a default security level. When you configure an
alert, you can optionally select a severity level for that alert
that overrides the system default severity level.

Atlas includes the following severity levels:

- Critical

- Error

- Warning

- Info

The severity levels in Atlas map to the following severity
levels in our third-party notification services:

| Atlas    | PagerDuty | Opsgenie | VictorOps | DataDog |
| -------- | --------- | -------- | --------- | ------- |
| Critical | Critical  | P1       | Critical  | Error   |
| Error    | Error     | P2       | Critical  | Error   |
| Warning  | Warning   | P4       | Warning   | Warning |
| Info     | Info      | P5       | Info      | Info    |
